Iulian Buleandra

#### What's great [...] Konstantin

#### What's great

Surprisingly good. You just answer a few questions and BizDraft fills in the rest - the draft it produces actually reads like a real legal agreement, not a generic template.

Alona

#### What's great

Really like how simple this is. Contracts are usually one of those tasks that turn into way too much research and second-guessing, especially when you’re starting from a generic template. This tool makes the process feel much more straightforward, and the fact that the document is tailored to your situation and still fully editable is a big plus. Nice work! [...] New User

#### What's great

It does not make business sense to hire a lawyer to draft a routine contract. As a lawyer, I used to do this for my clients, and always felt it was not a good service or ROI for them. I charge at least $2-3K for a contract that is just not worth the spend. With BizDraft you can take control and make decision on your own whether you want lawyer involved or not. Either way you are not starting from scratch. And ability to tailor contract to any use case is light years better than what it used to be few years ago.

#### What needs improvement

I am sure over time as more people give feedback, it will get more robust and be able to handle more tasks, also would be nice to go straight into signNow vs having to download

#### vs Alternatives

I’ve seen so many talented candidates get overlooked simply because their resumes didn’t clearly communicate their value. The fact that this tool is built on insights from reviewing thousands of real applications makes it way more practical than the usual advice out there. Curious to see how it handles things like phrasing impact or role fit!

@borja\_diazroig Thanks a ton Borja!   
  
All CVs are checked by an AI in this case. We have prepared this tool based on our own experience of running a recruiting firm and having helped 20+ companies build their teams.   
  
This tool does a far better job than all other tools out there, and we provide a lot of extra valuable suggestions like job recommendations, hackathons, etc. on the basis of the profile of the user.

Harsh Agrawal

One Dollar Resume Review

One Dollar Resume Review

Maker

📌

Contrary to popular belief, Resumes are still a very important part of the job hunt. If you can't impress someone in one page then it's very unlikely that they will spend time interviewing you. After going through 1000s of resumes and helping 20+ companies build their teams, we have created this AI-powered Resume Review tool that will help you to identify and resolve the most common issues.
